case_title: STANSBERRY, DOROTHY VS SEWING MACHINE & VACUUM

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-25-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06 TRIAL OF DEC-16-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SEWING MACHINE & VACUUM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT STANSBERRY, DOROTHY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SEWING MACHINE & VACUUM
CERTIFIED MAIL TO DOROTHY STANSBERRY RETURNED AND SIGNED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SEWING MACHINE & VACUUM
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $120.00 FILED BY SEWING MACHINE & VACUUM AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT STANSBERRY, DOROTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $256.94 FILED BY STANSBERRY, DOROTHY AS TO DEFENDANT SEWING MACHINE & VACUUM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANSBERRY, DOROTHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEWING MACHINE & VACUUM $155.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $170.00, PLFTS TO RETURN DEFTS SEWING MACHINE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
